sources.title: PropTech Investment Trends 2026: Key Opportunities and Funding Insights
sources.claim_supported: 92% of CRE companies now running AI pilots (up from 5% in 3 years); AI in PropTech market projected to $159.9B by 2033 at 22.8% CAGR; growth_5y derivation

sources.title: 2026 PropTech Predictions: Anyone Up for AI?
sources.claim_supported: Industry outlook for AI PropTech in 2026; VC investor sentiment; CRE adoption drivers

sources.title: Compass Breaks Records, Rocket Closes Redfin Deal — BAM
sources.claim_supported: Rocket closes Redfin acquisition; Compass $2.06B Q2 2025 revenue; 21% transaction growth; market structure data

notes.growth_5y_methodology: Based on AI in PropTech growing from ~$13.6B (2021 estimate, back-calculated from $20.5B in 2023 at 22.8% CAGR) to ~$37.9B in 2026 (same CAGR projected forward), yielding +179%. Source: Qubit Capital / PropTech AI market projections.
notes.growth_1y_methodology: PropTech market $47.08B (2025) to $54.66B (2026) per Precedence Research = +16.1%.
notes.growth_3m_methodology: PropTech AI venture funding surged 176% YoY in January 2026 specifically (per The AI Consulting Network), used as the most recent near-term growth signal for the sector.
notes.unverified_claims: Lofty $100M ARR, 37% conversion improvement, and 70% YoY growth are from company-reported figures without independent audit. HouseCanary 120M property valuations and 65M Series C are from company materials. Virtual staging adoption growth of 400% in 2025 is an industry estimate without a single published source and should be treated as directional.
notes.market_share_notes: Market share figures represent segment-specific dominance, not a single unified market. Zillow ~25% is US residential portal traffic share; CoStar ~60% is commercial RE data market; Opendoor 65% is iBuying (instant-offer) segment; Rocket ~8% is US mortgage origination volume share; Compass ~4% is US residential brokerage transaction share.
